rows.label: tev062001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Yoyotsu about the Nopon diet.

rows.label: tev062001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev062001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Yoyotsu if she's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev062001_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Yoyotsu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev062001_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Yoyotsu about the Nopon diet.

rows.label: tev062001_SEL2041
rows.name: Ask Yoyotsu about the Nopon diet.

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0001
rows.name:
Yoyotsu is on quest to eat
every last yummy food on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Latest and greatest thing Yoyotsu try
is scrumptious food called "evello."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0003
rows.name:
Dangly thing in throat of evello
smell delicious. Also taste
totally crunchy when grilled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0004
rows.name:
Is this what friends call...delicacy?
And can Yoyotsu sell it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0008
rows.name: Mamapon goes out and hunts food we eat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0009
rows.name:
If it looks edible, chances are
Mamapon has bagged it at least once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0010
rows.name:
Mamapon says her next hunting trip
will be to Twisty Turny Tree!
Humans call it Coil Tree Cape.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmm, does that mean fish?
Yoyotsu want to eat fish! Yum![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0016
rows.name:
Yoyotsu forgot to pack lunch when
going to look for Satsu. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0017
rows.name:
So Yoyotsu ate raw kusakiri
stag beetles and grilled
morphling flounders instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0018
rows.name:
Mumutsu said Yoyotsu
could survive anywhere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0019
rows.name:
Is that major compliment? Is this
birth of wilderness survivor Yoyotsu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0025
rows.name:
Yoyotsu is on quest to eat
every last yummy food on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0026
rows.name:
Latest and greatest thing Yoyotsu try is
scrumptious food called "lophid liver."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0027
rows.name: [ST:playername ] can try it too! So easy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0028
rows.name:
Just defeat lophid, then rip open belly
and tear out gooey, delicious liver.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0029
rows.name:
Watching liver quiver will make friend
shiver! It is true Miran delicacy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0035
rows.name:
Yoyotsu is on quest to eat
every last yummy food on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0036
rows.name:
Deeeeep deep-deep-deep in Nightglow
Forest is place with lots of red
branches. Has friend seen it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0037
rows.name: Anyway, there is huuuuge bird there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0038
rows.name:
It look really strong—but Yoyotsu
know delicacy when Yoyotsu see one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062001_MSG0039
rows.name:
What Yoyotsu would not give to
sink teeth into such tasty treat![ST:wait ]
